title: GlossaryTermRelationGraph
description: A bounded graph of glossary terms and their typed relations.

nodes.description: Glossary terms included in the graph.

edges.description: Directed relations included in the graph.

truncated.description: Whether additional authorized nodes or edges were omitted by the requested slice limits.

truncationReason.description: Limit that bounded the returned graph slice.

nodeLimit.description: Maximum number of nodes requested for this slice.

edgeLimit.description: Maximum number of edges requested for this slice.
